Material for ESL/EFL Instruction Lesson 1 Introduction

Material for ESL/EFL Instruction Drake Asberry 2020-12-29 Lesson 1 Introduction This is a website started in December 2020 as a project I started to document resources I have created or found useful over the years. The intent is that it will continue to grow and evolve while remaining portable because traveling with all these physical items is too cumbersome. I hope that others will find the resources here useful as well. If you would like to contribute to this site, please submit a pull request via the github repository.

Lesson 2 Vocabulary Phrasal Verbs: english-hilfen: This website provides a summary of phrasal verbs, the difference between phrasal verbs and prepositional verbs, and a list of common phrasal verbs. Following the lists and explanations, they give several example exercises. Note: This site does tend to use items more commonly associated with British English rather than American English.

Lesson 5 Writing Writing materials coming soon!

Lesson 6 Listening Lyrics Training: This website provides a unique learning experience using songs that have lyrics missing and the user must type in the missing words. It offers 4 different skill levels. CNN10: This website provides learners with real authentic news in English. It is always broken down in 10 minute videos. This is more useful in intermediate and advanced level English classes.
